inputs.label: Generator Rated Power
inputs.businessContext: Maximum continuous electrical power output of the generator as specified by the manufacturer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum continuous electrical power output of the generator as specified by the manufacturer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici tarafından belirtilen jeneratörün maksimum sürekli elektrik gücü çıkışı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximum continuous electrical power output of the generator as specified by the manufacturer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance électrique continue maximale du générateur spécifiée par le fabricant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia eléctrica continua máxima del generador según lo especificado por el fabricante.

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average percentage of rated power at which the generator operates during the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average percentage of rated power at which the generator operates during the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Jeneratörün periyot boyunca çalıştığı anma gücünün ortalama yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Average percentage of rated power at which the generator operates during the period.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage moyen de la puissance nominale auquel le générateur fonctionne pendant la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje promedio de la potencia nominal al que opera el generador durante el período.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours the generator is expected to run per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hours the generator is expected to run per day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Jeneratörün günde çalışması beklenen saat sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Number of hours the generator is expected to run per day.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'heures de fonctionnement prévu du générateur par jour.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de horas que se espera que el generador funcione por día.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volume of fuel consumed per kilowatt-hour of electrical energy generated, at the given load factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of fuel consumed per kilowatt-hour of electrical energy generated, at the given load factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verilen yük faktöründe, üretilen kilovat-saat elektrik enerjisi başına tüketilen yakıt hacmi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volume of fuel consumed per kilowatt-hour of electrical energy generated, at the given load factor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume de carburant consommé par kilowattheure d'énergie électrique générée, au facteur de charge donné.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de combustible consumido por kilovatio-hora de energía eléctrica generada, en el factor de carga dado.

inputs.label: Fuel Density
inputs.businessContext: Mass density of the fuel (e.g., diesel ~0.85 kg/L).

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass density of the fuel (e.g., diesel ~0.85 kg/L).
businessContext_i18n.de: Mass density of the fuel (e.g., diesel ~0.85 kg/L).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du carburant (ex. diesel ~0,85 kg/L).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad másica del combustible (p. ej., diésel ~0.85 kg/L).

inputs.label: Generator Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the generator in converting mechanical input to electrical output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the generator in converting mechanical input to electrical output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Jeneratörün mekanik girişi elektrik çıkışına dönüştürme verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Efficiency of the generator in converting mechanical input to electrical output.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement du générateur dans la conversion de l'entrée mécanique en sortie électrique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del generador al convertir la entrada mecánica en salida eléctrica.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
